debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩
    rw [←hX]
    intro y ⟨x, _, hxy⟩
    rw [←hxy]
    exact x.property
  · intro hS
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro ⟨x, hx, hxy⟩
      rw [←hxy]
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, hS hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩
successful_attempts:

  · intro hS
